rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"lesson","text":"When collections are removed from Payload config, stale comments referencing them can remain. Always audit and remove outdated comments when cleaning up collections.","scope":"src/payload.config.ts"},{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Pool stats returning all zeros indicates the monitoring implementation may not be capturing stats correctly - verify the health endpoint actually reflects live pool state, not just initialized zeros.","scope":"src/app/api/health/route.ts"}]}
